channel.title: Caching on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Caching on Systology

item.title: URL Shortener & Pastebin
item.description: A robust structural design for a highly available, extremely read-heavy service bridging short aliases to long URLs; implementing Base62 encoding, Snowflake IDs, and strict collision avoidance.

item.title: Proximity Service for Maps
item.description: An optimized system design for discovering nearby points of interest with ultra-low latency; deeply focusing on efficient spatial indexing via Geohashing, Quadtrees, and read-heavy caching tiers.

item.title: Distributed Caching Layer for VCS
item.description: An optimized distributed caching architecture designed to drastically reduce backend I/O and accelerate VCS operations; intelligently caching heavy objects and hashes with ultra-low latency.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.
